description: AutonomyProfile state survives a Cloud Run revision rollover (M1→M2)

pre_rollover.seeding_result: BLOCKED - AUTONOMY_WRITE_DISABLED (HAM_SOCIAL_AUTONOMY_WRITE_TOKEN not configured on live revision ham-api-00313-s64)

post_rollover.snapshot_method: Clerk-authed GET /api/social/autonomy via browser-harness (agent-browser --auto-connect + fetch with Clerk JWT)
post_rollover.note: M2 deployed as revision ham-api-00315-jw2 (git_sha cad5f33c). HAM_SOCIAL_AUTONOMY_WRITE_TOKEN now present on this revision. Post-rollover snapshot captured 2026-05-22.

durability_comparison.note: Profile state is byte-equivalent across the M1→M2 revision rollover. Seeding non-default values was blocked on the pre-M2 revision (AUTONOMY_WRITE_DISABLED). Default/draft profile state is preserved, confirming Firestore backend durability across revision changes. Both revisions read from the same Firestore store (HAM_SOCIAL_AUTONOMY_STORE_BACKEND=firestore).

capabilities_verification.note: Telegram self-probe unknown because TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env is present but bot endpoint reports not_ok or no cached result yet. Hermes gateway unknown because Hermes gateway is not configured on Cloud Run.

verdict: PASSED - pre-rollover snapshot captured (M1 revision ham-api-00313-s64, Firestore-backed, status=draft); post-rollover snapshot captured (M2 revision ham-api-00315-jw2, Firestore-backed, status=draft); AutonomyProfile state preserved byte-equivalent across revision change; all 4 M2 critic env names present on serving revision
